/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/SandBox.dir/scr/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SandBox.dir/scr/Layers/ExampleLayer.cpp.o -o SandBox  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kelly/SandBox/build/Bear:/home/kelly/SandBox/build/Bear/vendor/spdlog ../Bear/libBear.so ../imgui/libimgui.a ../Bear/vendor/spdlog/libspdlogd.so.1.16.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so
